title: Dracula Theme Hybrid
description: A colorful dark GUI for Minecraft based on vanilla textures
body:
![banner](https://github.com/dracula/minecraft/blob/dev-main/images/bannerhybrid.png?raw=true)
## About

Looking for a dark GUI with vanilla textures, but want something more colorful and stylized than existing ones? This is the pack for you!

**Dracula Theme - Hybrid** is a full makeover of the vanilla GUI using colors from the [Dracula Color Palette](https://draculatheme.com/contribute) with the goal of not only being easy on the eyes, but also more interesting to use! Featuring custom UI sounds, a unique title screen and even mod support! (wip)

![HUD](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/445108672851345410/1075901690676527124/hud-hybrid.png)
![Inventory](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/445108672851345410/1075921689222860940/Inventory_Preview.png)
## Resources

Want to submit feedback or report an issue with the pack? Open up an issue on the [Github Repo](https://github.com/dracula/minecraft/issues) or join my [Discord!](https://discord.gg/3gtNAQgv2G)

Like this theme? Check out the [official Dracula website](https://draculatheme.com/) to find themes for all your favorite programs!
